name: TG RAG — 3. Daily Digest (Google Sheets → RAG → Channel)

parameters.query:
SELECT key, value FROM tg_config
WHERE key IN ('retention_days', 'similarity_min', 'search_top_k');

WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    '{{ String($json.queryText).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text AS query_text,
    '{{ String($json.chatId).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text AS chat_id,
    '{{ String($json.sessionId).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::text AS session_id,
    '{{ $json.queryVector }}'::vector AS qvec,
    {{ $json.retentionDays }}::int AS retention_days,
    {{ $json.similarityMin }}::float AS similarity_min,
    {{ $json.topK }}::int AS top_k
), hits AS (
  SELECT
    msg_id,
    channel_title,
    text,
    msg_date::date AS msg_date,
    (1 - (embedding <=> (SELECT qvec FROM params)))::float AS similarity
  FROM tg_messages
  WHERE
    msg_date >= NOW() - ((SELECT retention_days FROM params) * INTERVAL '1 day')
    AND embedding IS NOT NULL
    AND (1 - (embedding <=> (SELECT qvec FROM params))) >= (SELECT similarity_min FROM params)
  ORDER BY embedding <=> (SELECT qvec FROM params)
  LIMIT (SELECT top_k FROM params)
)
SELECT
  p.query_text,
  p.chat_id,
  p.session_id,
  h.msg_id,
  h.channel_title,
  h.text,
  h.msg_date,
  h.similarity
FROM params p
LEFT JOIN hits h ON true;
